MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT GOT LIGHT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES is denied. Proof of service is not valid. "I caused to be delivered" does not show personal knowledge of service. Prevailing party may submit a proposed form of order. (301/PJB) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR# 11604
